files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.InputParamBindingExtensions
files.Summary: Binds an annotated schema object from values currently stored in .

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.InputParamDataType
files.Summary: Specifies a specialized data type for parameters when property type alone is insufficient.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.InputParamIgnoreAttribute
files.Summary: Marks properties that should not be treated as persisted input parameters.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.InputParamLoggingExtensions
files.Summary: Provides helper methods for logging typed input schema objects.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.InputParamMetadata
files.Summary: Metadata describing a schema property annotated with .

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.InputParameter
files.Summary: Base class for parameter value types, providing notification, metadata, and validation support.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.InputSchemaBuilder
files.Summary: Builds an dictionary from an annotated schema type.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.InputSchemaMetadata
files.Summary: Provides typed access to schema metadata without requiring string keys.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.IntParameter
files.Summary: An integer parameter.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.ListParameter<T>
files.Summary: A generic list/collection parameter for storing multiple values of the same primitive type. Values are stored as a comma-separated (or custom-separated) string in JSON.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.ParameterChangedEventArgs
files.Summary: Provides data for the parameter changed event.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.StringParameter
files.Summary: A string parameter.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.TimeSpanParameter
files.Summary: A timespan parameter for durations.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.ValueRange
files.Summary: Represents the allowed range for a parameter value.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Plugin.IStrategyPlugin
files.Summary: Defines a plugin that can register services into the dependency injection container for extending strategy functionality.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Plugin.IStrategyPluginInputSchema
files.Summary: Declares the input schema type for a strategy plugin. The schema type is parsed by the platform to build InputParameter defaults.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Plugin.IStrategyPluginMetadata
files.Summary: Provides metadata information for a strategy plugin.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Settings.Enums.DateOption
files.Summary: Preset date ranges used by backtests and data queries.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Settings.Enums.PriceDataOption
files.Summary: Price data granularity used by simulation and replay.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Settings.StrategySettings
files.Summary: Encapsulates the configuration settings required for running a trading strategy, supporting both live trading and backtesting environments.

files.Title: Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.StrategyBase
files.Summary: Base class for all trading strategies.
